---
title: "R vs SAS Confidence Intervals for Independent Proportions"
---

# Introduction

See the [summary page](../method_summary/ci_for_prop_intro.html) for general introductory information on confidence intervals for proportions, including the principles underlying the most common methods.

For more technical derivation of methods for comparing independent proportions, see the corresponding [SAS page](https://psiaims.github.io/CAMIS/SAS/ci_for_2indep_prop.html).

The tables below provide an overview of findings from R & SAS, for calculation of CIs for 2 independent sample proportions.

Note that if the number of responses in both groups is zero, SAS fails to produce confidence intervals for the difference.

# General Comparison Table For Proportion Difference from 2 independent samples

+---------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Analysis of Two Independent Sample Proportions                | Supported in R                        | Supported in SAS | Results Match                                                                             |
+===============================================================+=======================================+==================+===========================================================================================+
| Normal approximation (Wald Method)                            | Yes {DescTools}                       | Yes (default)    | Yes and results match by hand calculation                                                 |
|                                                               |                                       |                  |                                                                                           |
|                                                               | `BinomDiffCI(..,method=c("wald"))`    |                  |                                                                                           |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Agresti-Caffo                                                 | Yes {DescTools}                       | Yes              | Yes                                                                                       |
|                                                               |                                       |                  |                                                                                           |
|                                                               | `BinomDiffCI(..,method=c("ac"))`      |                  |                                                                                           |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| MOVER-Wilson (Newcombe hybrid score) method                   | Yes {DescTools}                       | Yes              | Yes and results match by hand calculation.                                                |
|                                                               |                                       |                  |                                                                                           |
|                                                               | `BinomDiffCI(..,method=c("score"))`   |                  | **Warning**: {DescTools} 'method=score' not to be confused with Asymptotic Score methods. |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| MOVER-Jeffreys                                                | Yes {ratesci}                         | No               | NA                                                                                        |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Miettinen-Nurminen Asymptotic Score                           | Yes {DescTools}                       | Yes              | Yes                                                                                       |
|                                                               |                                       |                  |                                                                                           |
|                                                               | `BinomDiffCI(..,method=c("mn"))`      |                  |                                                                                           |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Mee Asymptotic Score                                          | Yes {DescTools}                       | Yes              | Yes                                                                                       |
|                                                               |                                       |                  |                                                                                           |
|                                                               | `BinomDiffCI(..,method=c("mn"))`      |                  |                                                                                           |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Skewness-corrected Asymptotic Score                           | Yes {ratesci}                         | No               | NA                                                                                        |
|                                                               |                                       |                  |                                                                                           |
|                                                               | `scasci(..,contrast="RD")`            |                  |                                                                                           |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                               |                                       |                  |                                                                                           |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Normal approximation (Wald Method) with continuity correction | Yes {DescTools}                       | Yes              | Yes                                                                                       |
|                                                               |                                       |                  |                                                                                           |
|                                                               | `BinomDiffCI(..,method=c("waldcc"))`  |                  |                                                                                           |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Hauck-Anderson continuity adjusted                            | Yes {DescTools}                       | Yes              | Yes                                                                                       |
|                                                               |                                       |                  |                                                                                           |
|                                                               | `BinomDiffCI(..,method=c("ha"))`      |                  |                                                                                           |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| MOVER-Wilson (Newcombe) method with continuity adjustment     | Yes {DescTools}                       | Yes              | Yes                                                                                       |
|                                                               |                                       |                  |                                                                                           |
|                                                               | `BinomDiffCI(..,method=c("scorecc"))` |                  |                                                                                           |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 'Exact' methods                                               | No                                    | Yes              | NA                                                                                        |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

# General Comparison Table For Relative Risk from 2 independent samples

(Continuity-adjusted methods omitted for brevity)

+------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------+--------------------------+---------------+
| Analysis of Two Independent Sample Proportions | Supported in R                                     | Supported in SAS         | Results Match |
+================================================+====================================================+==========================+===============+
| Normal approximation (Wald/Katz log Method)    | Yes {DescTools}                                    | Yes (default)            | Yes           |
|                                                |                                                    |                          |               |
|                                                | `BinomRatioCI(..,method=c("katz.log"))`            |                          |               |
+------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------+--------------------------+---------------+
| Likelihood ratio                               | No                                                 | Yes                      | NA            |
|                                                |                                                    |                          |               |
|                                                |                                                    | `CL=LR`                  |               |
+------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------+--------------------------+---------------+
| MOVER-Wilson (Newcombe hybrid score) method    | Yes {ratesci}                                      | No                       | NA            |
|                                                |                                                    |                          |               |
|                                                | `moverci(..,contrast="RR", type="wilson")`         |                          |               |
+------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------+--------------------------+---------------+
| MOVER-Jeffreys                                 | Yes {ratesci}                                      | No                       | NA            |
|                                                |                                                    |                          |               |
|                                                | `moverci(..,contrast="RR", type="jeff")`           |                          |               |
+------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------+--------------------------+---------------+
| Miettinen-Nurminen Asymptotic Score            | Yes {DescTools}                                    | Yes                      | Yes           |
|                                                |                                                    |                          |               |
|                                                | `BinomRatioCI(..,method=c("mn"))`                  | `CL=score`               |               |
|                                                |                                                    |                          |               |
|                                                | Yes {ratesci}                                      |                          |               |
|                                                |                                                    |                          |               |
|                                                | `scoreci(..,contrast="RR", skew=FALSE)`            |                          |               |
+------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------+--------------------------+---------------+
| Koopman Asymptotic Score                       | Yes {DescTools}                                    | Yes                      | Yes           |
|                                                |                                                    |                          |               |
|                                                | `BinomDiffCI(..,method=c("mn"))`                   | `CL=(score(correct=no))` |               |
|                                                |                                                    |                          |               |
|                                                | Yes {ratesci}                                      |                          |               |
|                                                |                                                    |                          |               |
|                                                | `scoreci(..,contrast="RR", skew=FALSE, bcf=FALSE)` |                          |               |
+------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------+--------------------------+---------------+
| Skewness-corrected Asymptotic Score            | Yes {ratesci}                                      | No                       | NA            |
|                                                |                                                    |                          |               |
|                                                | `scoreci(..,contrast="RR", skew=TRUE, bcf=TRUE)`   |                          |               |
+------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------+--------------------------+---------------+

# General Comparison Table For Odds Ratio from 2 independent samples

(Continuity-adjusted methods omitted for brevity)

+------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------+---------------+
| Analysis of Two Independent Sample Proportions | Supported in R                                                    | Supported in SAS         | Results Match |
+================================================+===================================================================+==========================+===============+
| Normal approximation (Wald/Woolf logit Method) | Yes {contingencytables}                                           | Yes (default)            | Yes           |
|                                                |                                                                   |                          |               |
|                                                | `Woolf_logit_CI_2x2()`                                            |                          |               |
+------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------+---------------+
| Likelihood ratio                               | No                                                                | Yes                      | NA            |
|                                                |                                                                   |                          |               |
|                                                |                                                                   | `CL=LR`                  |               |
+------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------+---------------+
| Mid-P                                          | Yes {contingencytables}                                           | Yes                      | Yes           |
|                                                |                                                                   |                          |               |
|                                                | `Cornfield_midP_CI_2x2()`                                         |                          |               |
+------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------+---------------+
| MOVER-Wilson (Newcombe hybrid score) method    | Yes {ratesci}                                                     | No                       | NA            |
|                                                |                                                                   |                          |               |
|                                                | `moverci(..,contrast="OR", type="wilson")`                        |                          |               |
+------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------+---------------+
| MOVER-Jeffreys                                 | Yes {ratesci}                                                     | No                       | NA            |
|                                                |                                                                   |                          |               |
|                                                | `moverci(..,contrast="OR", type="jeff")`                          |                          |               |
+------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------+---------------+
| Miettinen-Nurminen Asymptotic Score            | Yes {ratesci}                                                     | Yes                      | Yes           |
|                                                |                                                                   |                          |               |
|                                                | `scoreci(..,contrast="OR", skew=FALSE, or_bias = FALSE)`          | `CL=score`               |               |
+------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------+---------------+
| Uncorrected Asymptotic Score                   | Yes {ratesci}                                                     | Yes                      | Yes           |
|                                                |                                                                   |                          |               |
|                                                | `scoreci(..,contrast="OR", skew=FALSE, or_bias=FALSE, bcf=FALSE)` | `CL=(score(correct=no))` |               |
+------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------+---------------+
| Skewness-corrected Asymptotic Score            | Yes {ratesci}                                                     | No                       | NA            |
|                                                |                                                                   |                          |               |
|                                                | `scoreci(..,contrast="OR", skew=TRUE, or_bias=TRUE, bcf=TRUE)`    |                          |               |
+------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------+---------------+

## Prerequisites: R Packages

See the [R page](https://psiaims.github.io/CAMIS/R/ci_for_prop.html) for more detail.

```{r}
# Example R packages required
library(cardx)
library(ratesci)
```
